title: 皐月賞の後に・駆け込みの大舞台

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black runs in the Satsuki Sho and gives it
her all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she spots reporters flocking to
Brusquement after the race. It seems she still
doesn't measure up to her rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the Classic Triple Crown is just getting
started. Sakura Bakushin O gives her some much
needed encouragement, and Kitasan Black is able
to keep pushing forward.
